records.ety: [Charles + wain; cf. AS. Carles wǣn (for wægn), Sw. karlvagnen, Dan. karlsvogn. See Churl, and Wain.]

defs: The group of seven stars, commonly called the Big Dipper, in the constellation Ursa Major, or Great Bear. See Ursa major, under Ursa.
notes: ☞ The name is sometimes also applied to the Constellation.
